programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:
That 1.3m swell and crosswind likely promises a choppy, shoulder-high mess best suited for advanced wave avoidance.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.3m and with that wind, today's waves will be more like a washing machine than a ride.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell and onshore breeze suggest a short, bumpy ride followed by a sandy snack.

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy
